IAMUser.title: IAMUser
IAMUser.description: Represents an IAM user profile within the application access directory.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile.

name.description: Display name of the user profile.

createdAt.description: ISO timestamp indicating when the profile was created.

PlayerDatabase.title: PlayerDatabase
PlayerDatabase.description: Stores the central player roster CSV, attendees list, guests, and configuration settings.

csvContent.description: The current master CSV database of players.

rawAttendeesText.description: The raw text input representing the pasted attendees list.

nameMappings.description: Explicit key-value pair map of nickname or variation lookups to standard names.

selectedNumTeams.description: The selected quantity of teams to partition groups into.

segregatedPairs.description: Normalized pairs of player IDs to always place onto separate squads.

updatedAt.description: ISO timestamp of the latest database save.

/iam_users/{userId}.description: Individual documents representing registered IAM access profiles.

/settings/players.description: A single global configuration document holding the master player list and builder parameters.
